content:
Post 1

📉 ASX 200 cracked below its 50-day moving average Wednesday, closing at 8,722.90, down 0.64%. Financials and Consumer Staples led the selling. The index is now down 0.97% over five days. Year-to-date gains: gone. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2

🔴 Consumer Staples worst sector, -2.14%. Financials close behind at -1.67%. On the other side, Health Care +0.77% and Utilities +0.52% offered shelter. A classic defensive rotation — money moving away from rate-sensitive names. #ASX #ausbiz #banking

Post 3

PPT surged +16.77% to AUD 18.10, the session's standout. MFG added +11.97%. Two fund managers ripping higher on the same day points to a sector catalyst, not stock-specific noise. #ASX #ausbiz #funds

Post 4

🪙 Gold at AUD 5,770.42/oz with AUD/USD at 0.6883. A softer local currency keeps gold elevated in AUD terms, supporting Materials +0.35% even as broader market sold off. Silver AUD 84.02/oz. #gold #silver #metals #ASX

Post 5

Watch the 8,722 level. ASX 200 just broke its 50-day MA — does it reclaim it or extend lower? US close tonight is the key input. Where do you see support: 8,650 or lower? #ASX #ausbiz #technicals
